name: Dify
description: Open-source LLM app and agent development platform. Build, test, and deploy RAG pipelines, chatbots, and multi-agent workflows via visual canvas and REST API.

skills.name: Visual Canvas
skills.description: Build agent workflows visually with drag-and-drop canvas — no code required for basic flows

skills.name: RAG Pipeline
skills.description: Ingest, chunk, and embed documents into a managed knowledge base with built-in retrieval

skills.name: REST API
skills.description: Deploy any workflow as a REST API endpoint callable from external agents and applications

skills.name: Multi-Model Support
skills.description: Switch between OpenAI, Claude, Llama, and 100+ models without changing app logic

skills.name: MCP Server
skills.description: Expose Dify workflows as MCP tools for Claude Desktop and MCP-compatible clients
